payload.description: ANALYST proposes VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001: CLOUD_CODE has completed smoke validation of the autonomous multi-agent governance loop (commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9) and returned next_actor_role ANALYST with next_expected_event VERIFICATION_REQUIRED. ANALYST now proposes formal verification of the smoke execution results. Verification scope: (1) Confirm governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json exists on main branch at commit 2ea1fb942c58d554f6d061c767cd5a92878deda9 with pass status for all five validation checks. (2) Confirm .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml contains both the dispatch role filter (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5) and server-side current_task.json update step gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae). (3) Confirm .github/workflows/analyst-verifier-runner.yml exists with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26). (4) Confirm ledger entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 ACTION_COMPLETED events are present with correct commit SHAs. (5) Confirm no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for TASK-P3-0011 or TASK-P3-0012. Proof target is AUDITOR PRE_ACTION_APPROVED decision confirming smoke validation results are accurate and autonomous loop integrity is verified, enabling advancement to next roadmap phase.
payload.proof_target: AUDITOR issues PRE_ACTION_APPROVED confirming all five smoke validation checks in governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json are verified against main branch artifacts, autonomous loop integrity is confirmed, and system is cleared to advance to next roadmap phase
